candidate_problem_record.subject: Biology
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
Questions refer to the graph below that plots the temperature of water as a function of heat energy absorbed.
What state of matter does the line labeled X represent?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 问题是指下面的图,该图绘制了水的温度与吸收热能的函数关系。标记为 x 的水平线段代表什么状态?(答案是一个单词)
metadata.explanation_zh: 标记为 X 的直线表示液态水在标准大气压力下从 0°C (冰点) 到 100°C (沸点) 时的温度变化。
